seoTitle: Sunset Beach vs Swan View — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sunset Beach and Swan View. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sunset Beach vs Swan View: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sunset Beach and Swan View.
heading: Sunset Beach vs Swan View — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sunset Beach, Western Australia and Swan View, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunset Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Swan View (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sunset Beach or Swan View safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sunset Beach has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Swan View scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sunset Beach scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Swan View scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sunset Beach or Swan View?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunset Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
